name: Fionn Whitehead
biography:
Fionn Whitehead (RP: fɪn) (born July 18, 1997) is an English actor, known for playing the lead role in the 2017 film Dunkirk. Whitehead's acting was first credited in the 2016 ITV miniseries Him.

nationality: Richmond upon Thames, London, England, UK
